summary: Trader leans bullish after ES broke out of its week-long range (7365–7458). He expects a backtest of the 7458–7465 zone before continuing higher toward 7515, 7530, and 7555. He is holding a runner from a prior long and will wait for a Failed Breakdown setup before adding. Line in the sand: 7458. Above it bulls are in control and the breakout holds; below it ES likely falls back into the old range.
